mechanism_narrative: Low policy rates with stable inflation support equity valuations through discount-rate compression.
failure_condition: Rejected if 20-day SPX returns are not higher than baseline when FEDFUNDS is below 1% and CPIAUCSL inflation is flat-to-down, or if the triggered subset shows negative average forward returns over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Labor-market deterioration weakens earnings and risk appetite, pushing short-horizon equity returns lower.
failure_condition: Rejected if SPX produces positive average 20-day returns in triggered episodes, or if the sign does not remain negative when PAYEMS growth is below its 6-month trend.

mechanism_narrative: Retail demand growth supports revenue expectations and lifts equity prices over the next month.
failure_condition: Rejected if months with rising RSAFS do not show higher 20-day SPX returns than flat-or-falling RSAFS months, or if the relationship disappears when CPIAUCSL inflation is accelerating sharply.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production recovery raises earnings expectations and supports medium-horizon equity gains.
failure_condition: Rejected if rising INDPRO does not predict higher 60-day SPX returns, or if the effect vanishes when HOUST is weakening at the same time.

mechanism_narrative: Labor-market stabilization after a downturn prompts a short-term equity rebound.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE stops rising for 2 consecutive months after a prior 6-month increase
failure_condition: Rejected if the trigger condition is met but 5-day SPX returns are not positive on average, or if the sign is negative in more than half of trigger instances.

mechanism_narrative: Policy tightening lifts discount rates and pressures equity valuations in the near term.
failure_condition: Rejected if tightening episodes are followed by positive average 20-day SPX returns, or if the sign turns positive when CPIAUCSL inflation is above its 6-month average.

mechanism_narrative: Broad demand growth improves earnings expectations and supports quarter-ahead equity gains.
failure_condition: Rejected if positive GDP growth quarters are not followed by higher 60-day SPX returns than weak-growth quarters, or if the sign disappears when RSAFS is decelerating.

mechanism_narrative: Confirmed real-sector recovery in production and housing lifts equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rejected if joint improvements in INDPRO and HOUST do not outperform single-series improvements in predicting 20-day SPX returns, or if the joint signal is negative on average over any rolling 3-year window.
